acquisition method: The Q-Exactive Plus was operated in data-dependent acquisition mode with the Xcalibur software.
alkylation reagent: reduced and alkylated using equilibration buffers containing dithiothreitol and iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: Trypsin was chosen as the enzyme
fragmentation method: the ten most intense ions per survey scan were selected for HCD fragmentation
instrument: coupled to an Q-Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
labeling: Peptides mixtures were analysed by nano-LC-MS/MS
